text:
Therapy (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received oxygen therapy days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
964 OXGN_14_CD OXGN_14_CD O0110C1B Therapies: Oxygen Therapy (14 days) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received oxygen therapy while a resident of the facility and within the last 14 days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
965 OXGN_DSCHRG_CD
